author: anon-59ff128d
content: Delivered: Converted all mode functions (run_file_mode, run_json_mode, run_pipe_mode, run_script_mode, handle_undo) to return Result<(), i32>. Consolidated process::exit into a single call site in main(). All cleanup code (undo log saves, destructors) now runs on every exit path. Removed ~15 direct process::exit calls from mode modules. All 508 tests pass, 0 clippy warnings.
